tracks.rawText: 3:36PROJECT OBSIDIANv5.5CoverAccusatory electro dub trance with a punchy 4/4 kick, syncopated dub bass, and sawtooth trance arpeggios swept by resonant filters, Delayed snare echoes, tape echo throws on synth stabs, airy pads, and wide stereo modulation create a tense, driving club texture at peak-hour energy2PublishRemix
tracks.title: PROJECT OBSIDIAN

tracks.rawText: 2:03When You Know You Know x When You Know You Know (Mashup)v5.5MashupSad pop with ominous undercurrent: detuned felt piano, muted plucked guitar, soft 808 pulse, and distant analog pads, Sparse kick-snare pattern, reversed piano transitions, and low-string drones build unease under breathy lead vocals, close-miked harmonies, and wide delay throws for a love-song-as-warning feel1PublishRemix
tracks.title: When You Know You Know x When You Know You Know (Mashup)

tracks.rawText: 2:00When You Know You Know x When You Know You Know (Mashup)v5.5MashupSad pop with a plainspoken Tuesday-after-work feel: intimate piano, muted electric guitar plucks, soft sub-bass, and brushed kick-snare at 78 BPM, Add airy synth pads, sparse handclaps, and close-mic breathy vocals with delay throws on chorus lines, Clean mix, slight tape warmth, and a restrained, aching pop buildPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:17When You Know You Knowv5.5Punishing metalcore with drop-tuned palm-muted guitars, rapid double-kick, and guttural verses over a tight half-time breakdown, Add gritty gang shouts, dissonant lead harmonies, and a huge hook with layered clean vocals, pounding tom fills, sub-dropped bass, and thick room reverb for a raw, vengeful edgeTrevoir2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:29When You Know You Knowv5.5The heaviest wounds are carved in silence, ""A scream they’ll never hear, ""When family turns to stone, the soul burns alone, ""Silent betrayal cuts the deepest, ""This is not just metal, it’s vengeance in soundTrevoir3PublishRemix
